productDisplayName: Puma Men Lifestyle Graphitti Black T-shirt
description: Composition Black V-neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, brand badge on right sleeve and graffiti on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Flaunt your brand statement in style with this athletic graffiti t-shirt from puma. The energetic thunderbolt-styled P of puma on the front exudes fiery vibes, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day long. Team this with sportswear when on a fitness drive, and with jeans and black leather sandals for a cool, casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.1', Shoulders-18"
